channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Faded Road Marking, 16th July
item.description:
Stop lines have faded on site.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This vehicle is parked in an EV charge bay, 16th July
item.description:
Totally inconveniencing EV drivers who struggle enough to find charging by parking ALL NIGHT in an EV ONLY charge bay! This vehicle delivers flowers to the Tun Yard, Pearson street, SW8 3HT which is the building opposite it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Peardon Street, Clapham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The drains are all full and smell really bad you can clearly see this through the covers, 16th July
item.description:
The drains are all full you can clearly see this through the covers There is excessive really bad smells coming from the drains in the local roads especially at the junction of harman Road and John Street En11lb this has been reported to Thames Water several times and though they have come out nothing has been done its unacceptable that during summer we have to move to spare bedroom due to the smell several other residents have reported this lots of times and nothing is being done on one occasion they sent out 2 lads who put a letter through my door saying they had investigated but I watched them from my window and they didn't do anything just got out and posted note in my door I've footage to prove it as done other neighbours
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Harman Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Big water leak on pavement on bridge, 16th July
item.description:
Big water leak on pavement on bridge No idea how long it's been here because I usually use the roadm.m

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Asaph Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More fly tipping on pavement in front of Kingshold Community centre, 16th July
item.description:
The other day you cleared the pavement, thank you. but now there is another load. It is a danger to pedestrians, it attracts other dumpers and the rubbish is all over the area sometimes.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ainsworth Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Month long Continuous fly tipping !!!!, 16th July
item.description:
Unsightly and just unfair right outside my door I wake up everyday seeing this big mess outside my flat it’s really depressing, I’ve complained already but still nothing is done. Marked ask action taken but same mess from a month ago
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woodberry Down Estate, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mixed waste, 16th July
item.description:
Collection of waste

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sumner Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, 16th July
item.description:
Please can you pick up rubbish someone has come to close and dumped this

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Potters Close, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hole in pavement, 16th July
item.description:
This is the second time I’ve reported this and had a problems got even worse. Please fix it ASAP.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): St Marys Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 32-120 Rye Hill Park, 16th July
item.description:
NTUP officer southwark council found the main enterance door unscured please fix it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34-120, Rye Hill Park, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocking pavement, 16th July
item.description:
This vehicle is parking on the pavement so pedestrians have to walk into the road which is very dangerous at night with dimly lit Road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): St Marys Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing dog excrement bin, 16th July
item.description:
This bin has been overflowing for weeks now! The stench of it is absolutely disgusting and it is also a public health hazard, especially in the kind of temperatures we have been having in recent weeks. Why on earth is this bin allowed to get to this level? There are bags on top and on the floor at the grass level. It is entirely unacceptable. The whole of this green space is a complete mess and really brings the tone down on a road where people take pride in their homes. Please sort this out!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blandford Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This area is always used as a dumping ground, 16th July
item.description:
This area is always used as a dumping ground, and it’s rarely cleaned up. Put up signs there saying that trash cannot be dumped there, it’s not a dumping ground.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wharf Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Uncollected bin now attracting litter and flies, 16th July
item.description:
A household waste bin was not emptied and is placed on the street to prevent any flies/vermin in hot weather from entering home. However, there is a bin smell and passersby are now adding litter. As far as I know residents have reported missed collection.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glyn Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 4 beds and headboard dumped, 16th July
item.description:
4 bed bases and 1 headboard dumped on street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nadine Street, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large amount of litter, 16th July
item.description:
Please clear along the road here, including on the road by the curb
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn Lane, Kilburn, London
